eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:21 PM on JUN 17, 2026 Effective until 6:21 AM JUN 18, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Peoria Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Peoria Police Department is looking for 74 year-old Peggy Le Blanc. Peggy is five foot two inches, 215 pounds with gray hair and blue eyes. Peggy is believed to be wearing a blue pattern or plaid long sleeve shirt, with a red walker and slide on slippers. Peggy suffers from a medical condition(s) and may become disoriented or easily confused. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
